    G

    genericCostumerTest() - Method in class Unit_Tests.customerTest
     
    GenericCustomer - Class in RestaurantGame
    A GenericCustomer is a customer with randomly assigned attributes such as shape, color, and name.
    GenericCustomer() - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
    Creates a GenericCustomer with random shape, color, name, and patience level.
    GENEROUS - Enum constant in enum class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer.Personality

    Returns the current cooking state of the Patty.

    Returns how long this topping has been cooking so far.

    Returns this customer's favorite order.

    Returns the list of ingredients as an ArrayList.

    Returns the full list of ingredients in the oven.

    getName() - Method in interface RestaurantGame.Customer
    Returns the customer's name.

    Returns the customer's name.

    Returns the customer's name.
    getName() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Player
     
    getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings>, int) - Method in interface RestaurantGame.Customer
    creates the customer's order based on a list of available ingredients and the maximum number of items the customer is allowed to pick.
    getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings>, int) - Method in class RestaurantGame.David
    Returns David's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings>, int) - Method in class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
    Generates a random order for the customer by selecting random toppings from the available ingredient list until maxPick.
    getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings>, int) - Method in class RestaurantGame.John
    Returns John's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings>, int) - Method in class RestaurantGame.Mariah
    Returns Mariah's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings>, int) - Method in class RestaurantGame.Peter
    Returns Peter's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    getOrder(ArrayList<Toppings>, int) - Method in class RestaurantGame.Sarah
    Returns Sarah's full order, which consists of a preset of favorite order and a repeated instances of favorite topping until the maximum number picks.
    getOrderSize() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Ticket
    Returns the number of toppings currently on this order.
    getOven() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Return oven
    getPattyImage() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Patty
    Returns the file name of the image representing this Patty’s current state.
    getPersonality() - Method in class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer
    Returns the personality type of the customer.

    get a Player object by name.
    getPlayerList() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    Returns this.playerList
    getPrepTime() - Method in class RestaurantGame.CookableToppings
    Returns the recommended preparation (cooking) time for this topping.
    getPrice() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Toppings
    Returns the price of this topping.
    getPrice(ArrayList<Toppings>) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Gets price for list of toppings.
    getScore() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Player
     
    getShape() - Method in interface RestaurantGame.Customer
    Returns shape of the customer.
    getShape() - Method in class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
    Gets the customer's shape.
    getShape() - Method in class RestaurantGame.KnownCustomer
    Returns the customer's shape.
    getShape(String, Label, Color) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Based on the String shape, calls method to make corresponding shape using the Label cqu0L and Color color
    getSize() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Basket
    Returns the current number of items inside the basket.
    getSize() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Oven
    Returns the current number of ingredients inside the oven.
    getToppingName() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Toppings
    Returns the name of this topping.
    getToppings() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Burger
    Returns a list containing all toppings in the burger in the order they were stacked.
    getToppingsList() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Ticket
    Returns the list of toppings included in this ticket.
